name: github-repo-creator
description: Create GitHub repositories for research reproduction workspaces, prompting for login when needed.

interface.shortDescription: Create GitHub repositories with login prompts when needed.
interface.longDescription: Adds a local GitHub repository creation helper for research reproduction workflows. It uses the GitHub CLI to prompt for login in interactive terminals, or GITHUB_TOKEN/GH_TOKEN in non-interactive runs.
defaultPrompt: Create a GitHub repo for this reproduction.
Make a private GitHub repo and add it as origin.
Check GitHub login before creating my repo.
